ddls:
CREATE TABLE "social_media_posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media post */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the post was published */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform where the post was published */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the social media post */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was last updated */,
  "post_url" TEXT /* URL of the social media post */,
  "post_type" TEXT /* Type of post (e.g., text, image, video) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_posts_platform FOREIGN KEY ("platform") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "themes" (
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theme */,
  "theme_name" TEXT /* Name of the theme (e.g., Travel, Education, Love) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the theme */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the theme was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the theme was last updated */,
  "theme_category" TEXT /* Category of the theme (e.g., travel, education, love) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_themes" (
  "post_theme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post-theme relationship */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the social media post */,
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the theme associated with the post */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post-theme relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post-theme relationship was last updated */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Relevance score of the theme for the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_theme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_themes_theme_id FOREIGN KEY ("theme_id") REFERENCES themes ("theme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_themes_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES social_media_posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis result */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the social media post */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the post (e.g., -1 to 1) */,
  "sentiment_type" TEXT /* Type of sentiment (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sentiment analysis was performed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sentiment analysis was last updated */,
  "sentiment_magnitude" TEXT /* Magnitude of the sentiment (e.g., strong, weak) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES social_media_posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, data scientist, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was granted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the social media platform */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the platform */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the platform was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the platform was last updated */,
  "platform_icon" TEXT /* Icon of the social media platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year for which data is available */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the year was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the year was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "theme_distribution" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theme distribution */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the theme */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of posts for the theme in the given year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the theme distribution was calculated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the theme distribution was last updated */,
  "distribution_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of posts for the theme in the given year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_theme_distribution_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_theme_distribution_theme_id FOREIGN KEY ("theme_id") REFERENCES themes ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment trend */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "sentiment_type" TEXT /* Type of sentiment (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of posts with the sentiment type in the given year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sentiment trend was calculated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sentiment trend was last updated */,
  "trend_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of posts with the sentiment type in the given year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_trends_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., theme distribution, sentiment analysis) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
